name: skip-reusable-workflow-jobs-in-checkout-validator
description: Extend a checkout-order validator to skip reusable workflow caller jobs, which have no steps of their own and must not be validated for checkout ordering. Use when: (1) a checkout-first validator fires false positives on reusable workflow caller jobs, (2) extending an existing steps-based validator to handle mixed job types, (3) adding a job-level guard before iterating over steps.
